codeReview.summary: The refactor extracts ticker-processing, snapshot writing, conversion-context creation, exchange-volume updates, and pending ticker upserts into focused helpers while keeping the surrounding refresh control flow, failure handling, cooldown semantics, and runtime/metrics integration intact. The added characterization test exercises forced failure, cooldown skip, partial failure, and successful recovery in one sequence and confirms the persisted BTC/USDT ticker side effects still match the pre-refactor contract.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, commit diff, src/services/market-refresh.ts helper extraction, and tests/market-refresh.test.ts characterization coverage for commit c4df63d94a7e4b18f61043ab1296f943b7a467b2. No correctness, contract-drift, or shared-state issues were identified; the refactor appears behavior-preserving and adequately characterized for the market-refresh runtime path.
